Configuration settings, macros, header files, event queue, mutex, semaphore, callout, and interrupt handlers for Apache Mynewt, NimBLE, and NRF52.

## Folders
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Configuration settings, macros, and header files for Apache Mynewt and NimBLE on Pebble OS and nRF52.
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Implements event queue, mutex, semaphore, callout functionalities, and interrupt handlers for NRF52.
